_note: Lifecycle classification for every governed artifact. status in {AUTHORITATIVE, GENERATED, RETAINED, MIGRATED, REMOVED, DEPRECATED, HISTORICAL_ONLY, BLOCKED}. Retained/deprecated/blocked items must record reason, runtime_active, replacement, removal_gate, owning_phase, risk_if_removed_early.

artifacts.note: FINAL Phase-0 contract; immutable history + one generated operational-status header.
Phase 1A CLOSED/frozen; scope/design of a closed phase with a generated status header; not a current-state source.
CURRENT phase plan (planning-only); generated status header + design body.
Exact grant matrix for Phase 1B Gate P; must agree with the Phase 1B plan.
One generated current-state section + manual explanatory sections.
Immutable Phase-1A acceptance evidence (18/18, ACCEPTED/CLOSED).
Immutable live FIAS spike + Gate 3A PASS evidence.
Permanent Zero-Stale-Leftovers rule.
Canonical mutable current-state source.
Permanent PO decisions.
This registry.
Structural validator + generator + deterministic pack builder.

Permanent GitHub execution/reporting/delivery operating rule incl. mandatory CI (GH-MANDATORY-CI) and agent-owned Git/GitHub operations (GH-AGENT-ONLY-OPERATIONS, GIT_OPERATIONS_OWNER: AGENT); companion to the Zero-Stale rule; enforced by project-state.py + validate-project-state.sh.
Deterministic Git changed-file manifest generator; every final report embeds its verbatim base..HEAD output (GH-COMPLETE-MANIFEST).
Mandatory 20-section final-report structure (GH-FINAL-REPORT).

Repository-side enforcement layer (GH-MANDATORY-CI): 'Project Governance' check runs validate/check-generated/mutation-suite/keyword-validator + clean-tree assertion on pull_request->master, push->master, and workflow_dispatch; read-only permissions; no deploy/DB/migrations.

Cross-platform LF policy (GH-LF-CONSISTENCY): pins governance/docs/migrations/scripts/config/source/pack text to eol=lf and marks ZIP/binary artifacts as binary so Windows/Linux/CI produce byte-identical, checksum-stable files. Required by tools/project-state.py validate.
Secondary keyword safety layer (ZERO_STALE_LEFTOVERS).
artifacts.risk_if_removed_early: loss of the keyword safety net
